name: Prompt Engine
description: Cross-entity variable resolution for AI generation prompts and document template rendering. Supports $field (local), $type.field (implicit), $type:id.field (explicit), and nested dot-path traversal.
author: BiloxiStudios

default_cache_ttl.label: Default Cache TTL (seconds)
default_cache_ttl.description: How long resolved variable values are cached. Set to 0 to disable caching.

strict_mode.label: Strict Mode
strict_mode.description: When enabled, resolution fails immediately on any unresolvable variable.

fallback_strategy.label: Fallback Strategy
fallback_strategy.description: How to handle optional variables that cannot be resolved.

max_value_length.label: Max Resolved Value Length (chars)
max_value_length.description: Maximum character length of a single resolved variable value (security truncation).
